violations.text: The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the prep unit on the cooking line. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. The freezer door handle was observed in poor repair on the cooking line. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine, and walk in cooler blower fans have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non Food contact surfaces must maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

The dumpster outside is located on dirt/loose asphalt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2026

Reduce oxygen package of lobster meat were observed thawing under refrigeration with the packaging in-tact. Lobster meat observed at 37 degrees F. Staff were instructed to open packages for proper thawing. Packages were cut open during time of the inspection. ROP retail policy given to person in charge. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/26/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets at the 2 door reach-in TRUE unit were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

The cutting boards in the preparation unit line is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the popcorn oil-holder and floor at the walk-in freezer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/26/2024

- Food contact surfaces of can opener was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. - Ice machine was observed with an accumulation of black/brown residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2023

Bake roasted chickens were observed held at 129 degrees Fahrenheit at the hot hold unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Chickens were re-headed at the time of the inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2023

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2023
Hood system above the fryolator observed to have accumulation of grease, dust, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2023
